## Investment View
CPRX scores 60/100 as a constructive_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture, with 6 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (25.82), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Price is above EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, which keeps the medium-term trend supportive. (medium)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 25.82 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
- The name is still only a candidate in the source feed, so the setup is not fully confirmed yet. (medium)

## Catalysts
- The next 1 to 4 weeks matter most around whether price can keep holding above 25.82 and attract follow-through volume. (medium)
